heading: Authority of Federal Bureau of Investigation to award personal services contracts
label: 3072 Authority of Federal Bureau of Investigation to award personal services contracts

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation may enter into personal services contracts if the personal services to be provided under such contracts directly support the intelligence or counterintelligence missions of the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

children.heading: Inapplicability of certain requirements
children.label: b Inapplicability of certain requirements
children.text: Contracts under subsection (a) shall not be subject to the annuity offset requirements of sections 8344 and 8468 of title 5, the requirements of , or any law or regulation requiring competitive contracting.section 3109 of title 5

children.heading: Contract to be appropriate means of securing services
children.label: c Contract to be appropriate means of securing services
children.text: The Chief Contracting Officer of the Federal Bureau of Investigation shall ensure that each personal services contract entered into by the Director under this section is the appropriate means of securing the services to be provided under such contract.
